scope: Invoke `chrome.action.openPopup()` from the installed extension service worker during the extension golden journey.
Keep visible popup Save coverage through an observable extension popup page with the real popup UI.
Verify toolbar action launch, popup tags, note, reader content, browser-snapshot provenance, Capture Events, and stripped public capture input in one installed-extension flow.
outOfScope: Pixel or DOM inspection of Chrome's native toolbar bubble target
definitionOfDone: `pnpm golden:extension` invokes `chrome.action.openPopup()` without error.
`pnpm golden:extension` still clicks the visible popup Save button and verifies saved content end to end.
`pnpm check` and `pnpm lint` pass after the extension golden refactor.
`pnpm verify` passes with the toolbar action smoke included.

verification.proves: The installed extension can launch its toolbar action popup API and still save through the visible popup UI.
The extension golden toolbar action helper remains type-safe.
The zero-warning lint gate remains clean after the extension golden refactor.
Toolbar action popup smoke remains compatible with the full local verification gate.

evidence.mockBoundary: Playwright does not expose Chrome's native toolbar bubble as an interactable page target in this run. The test therefore asserts `chrome.action.openPopup()` is executable and keeps the actual Save click on the observable popup page that uses the same production popup UI and background pipeline.
evidence.notes: The installed extension golden now launches the toolbar action popup API before opening the observable popup page for Save. The resulting item still preserves popup tags and note, reaches ready browser-snapshot recognition, renders reader content after Web manual Reload, and keeps captureInput out of public responses.

features.next: Use CDP target inspection only if future Chromium tooling exposes native toolbar bubble targets reliably.

features.title: Control connector state without fake sync
scope: Add API mutations for connector state updates and disconnects.
Add a connector sync endpoint that fails explicitly for disconnected or planned providers.
Keep connector definitions separate from mutable connection state.
Expose manual connector Sync and Disconnect controls in the web sidebar.
Keep planned connector availability visible without hiding actual local connection state.
Prevent the desktop sidebar from clipping Capture, connector, and diagnostics controls.
definitionOfDone: `PATCH /api/connectors/:provider` validates and stores local connector state.
`DELETE /api/connectors/:provider` clears mutable connector state.
`POST /api/connectors/:provider/sync` returns `409` or `501` instead of pretending sync succeeded.
`pnpm smoke:api` covers connector mutation, sync failure, and disconnect behavior.
`pnpm golden:visual` asserts connector controls and Capture controls are visible without clipping.
`pnpm verify` passes with the connector state control slice included.

verification.proves: Connector state updates, single-connector reads, disconnected sync failure, planned sync failure, and disconnect behavior work through the API.
Desktop connector controls and Capture controls remain visible and unclipped after the sidebar UI change.
Connector control remains compatible with the full static, unit, API, browser, extension, visual, and build gate.

evidence.mockBoundary: Connector state is local application state only. The slice does not implement Feishu/X OAuth, token storage, provider API imports, or background connector sync.
evidence.notes: The API can now update and clear connector state, and sync requests return explicit `409`/`501` responses when a provider is disconnected or still planned. The sidebar shows local connection state and planned availability separately, adds manual Sync/Disconnect controls, and uses scrollable non-shrinking sections so Capture and connector controls are not clipped.

features.next: Cancelled 2026-06-03: Hunter now captures every Saved Item through the browser extension snapshot, so connector state, OAuth, and sync controls are no longer part of the product.

features.title: Authorize Feishu and store connector tokens safely
scope: Add Feishu OAuth start and callback endpoints.
Generate short-lived OAuth state and PKCE authorization parameters.
Exchange authorization code for Feishu user access and refresh tokens.
Fetch Feishu account label after token exchange.
Store connector token material only as encrypted server-side credentials.
Delete stored credentials when the connector is disconnected.
Expose a manual Connect action in the web connector panel.
Keep connector sync/import explicitly unimplemented until provider import handlers exist.
definitionOfDone: `POST /api/connectors/feishu/oauth/start` returns a Feishu authorization URL when credentials are configured.
`GET /api/connectors/feishu/oauth/callback` exchanges code for token data, stores encrypted credentials, and marks Feishu connected.
Missing Feishu app credentials return `409` with actionable missing env vars.
Disconnecting Feishu removes encrypted connector credentials.
`pnpm test:connector-secrets` proves connector token sealing is not plaintext and round-trips with the configured key.
`pnpm smoke:api` covers missing config, authorization URL generation, callback token exchange, encrypted credential storage, and credential deletion.
`pnpm verify` passes with the Feishu OAuth foundation included.

verification.proves: Connector secret sealing hides plaintext token values and decrypts with the configured key.
Feishu OAuth start/callback, mocked token exchange, connector state, encrypted credential storage, and disconnect cleanup work through the API.
The sidebar shows manual Connect controls for Feishu and X without clipping.
Feishu OAuth foundation remains compatible with the full local gate.

evidence.mockBoundary: Smoke coverage mocks Feishu token and user-info HTTP responses. This slice implements OAuth authorization and encrypted local credential storage, but does not import Feishu documents, refresh tokens automatically, or sync background content.
evidence.notes: Feishu uses the current official OAuth authorize and token endpoints, stores short-lived OAuth state in memory with PKCE verifier data, and writes only AES-GCM sealed tokens through server-only repository credential methods. The web panel opens OAuth with a manual Connect action and still relies on Reload after callback completion.

features.next: Cancelled 2026-06-03: capture now flows through the browser extension snapshot, so Feishu OAuth, encrypted token storage, and connector callbacks were removed.

features.title: Import direct Feishu docx raw content on manual sync
scope: Extract direct `/docx/{document_id}` tokens from saved Feishu URLs.
Use encrypted Feishu connector credentials only on the server.
Fetch official Feishu document raw content with the user access token.
Replace URL-only `needs_connector` items with connector-provenance recognized content.
Run imported raw content through deterministic Content Signals, content hashing, recognition timing, and sanitized reader HTML.
Record connector Capture Events without storing raw content in the event stream.
Update connector `lastSyncAt` and preserve explicit error context when imports fail.
definitionOfDone: `POST /api/connectors/feishu/sync` imports direct docx URL-only items when Feishu is connected and credentials exist.
Imported items use `captureMethod: connector` and `sourceAccess: requires_auth` without `requiredConnector`.
Unsupported Feishu URLs, including wiki indirection, are skipped rather than falsely imported.
Capture Events record connector import outcomes without raw content leakage.
`pnpm smoke:api` covers OAuth, saved docx URL-only capture, raw-content import, item replacement, and event privacy.
`pnpm verify` passes with the Feishu raw-content sync slice included.

verification.proves: A saved direct Feishu docx URL can move from `needs_connector` to connector-imported `ready` content through manual sync with mocked Feishu raw-content API responses.
The shared content-quality gate supports connector text as a first-class content source.
Manual Feishu raw-content sync remains compatible with the full local gate.

evidence.mockBoundary: Smoke coverage mocks Feishu raw-content HTTP responses. The implementation uses the official raw-content endpoint shape for direct docx URLs but does not resolve wiki URLs, refresh expired tokens, import blocks/images/attachments, or schedule background sync.
evidence.notes: Manual Feishu sync now scans saved Feishu connector-needed items, imports direct docx raw content through the decrypted server-side user access token, rebuilds the item with connector provenance, and records a connector Capture Event whose response omits raw document text.

features.next: Cancelled 2026-06-03: server-side Feishu raw-content import was removed when capture became browser-snapshot only.

features.title: Resolve Feishu wiki URLs to docx raw content
scope: Extract `/wiki/{node_token}` tokens from saved Feishu URLs.
Resolve wiki nodes through the official Feishu wiki get_node API using the encrypted server-side user access token.
Import wiki nodes only when they resolve to docx objects.
Fetch the resolved docx raw content through the existing Feishu raw-content import path.
Use the resolved wiki node title when Feishu returns one.
Record connector Capture Events without storing raw content in the event stream.
definitionOfDone: `POST /api/connectors/feishu/sync` resolves saved wiki URL-only items to docx before raw-content import.
Imported wiki-backed items use `captureMethod: connector` and `sourceAccess: requires_auth` without `requiredConnector`.
Unsupported non-document wiki nodes are skipped rather than falsely imported.
Capture Events record wiki connector import outcomes without raw content leakage.
`pnpm smoke:api` covers OAuth scopes, saved wiki URL-only capture, wiki-node resolution, raw-content import, item replacement, and event privacy.
`pnpm verify` passes with the Feishu wiki resolution slice included.

verification.proves: A saved Feishu wiki URL can move from `needs_connector` to connector-imported `ready` content through manual sync with mocked Feishu wiki get_node and docx raw-content API responses.
The async wiki resolution path and connector import types compile cleanly.
Feishu wiki resolution remains compatible with the full local gate.

evidence.mockBoundary: Smoke coverage mocks Feishu wiki get_node and raw-content HTTP responses. The implementation uses the official endpoint shapes for wiki-node resolution and docx raw-content import, but does not import legacy doc wiki objects, refresh expired tokens, import blocks/images/attachments, or schedule background sync.
evidence.notes: Manual Feishu sync now scans saved Feishu connector-needed items, resolves wiki node tokens to docx object tokens when possible, imports the resolved docx raw content through the decrypted server-side user access token, uses the resolved node title, and records connector Capture Events without raw document text.

features.next: Cancelled 2026-06-03: Feishu wiki node resolution was part of the removed connector import path.

features.title: Refresh Feishu access tokens before manual sync
scope: Detect expired or near-expired Feishu access tokens before manual connector sync.
Use the stored encrypted refresh token with the official OAuth token endpoint.
Rotate and re-encrypt both access and refresh tokens after a successful refresh.
Fail loudly with reconnect guidance when refresh credentials are missing or expired.
Use the refreshed access token for subsequent docx raw-content and wiki get_node calls.
Keep token material server-only and absent from public connector APIs.
definitionOfDone: `POST /api/connectors/feishu/sync` refreshes expired or near-expired access tokens before provider API calls.
Refreshed credentials replace old encrypted access and refresh tokens in the repository.
Subsequent docx raw-content and wiki get_node requests use the refreshed access token.
`pnpm smoke:api` covers expired-token detection, refresh-token exchange, credential rotation, and connector import with refreshed authorization.
`pnpm verify` passes with the Feishu token refresh slice included.

verification.proves: Manual Feishu sync rotates an expired stored access token through the mocked official OAuth token endpoint and imports docx/wiki content with the refreshed access token.
The token refresh credential path and sync integration compile cleanly.
Sync-time Feishu token refresh remains compatible with the full local gate.

evidence.mockBoundary: Smoke coverage mocks the Feishu OAuth refresh, wiki get_node, and raw-content HTTP responses. The implementation refreshes tokens before manual sync, but does not schedule background sync, refresh permissions, import non-document wiki objects, or import blocks/images/attachments.
evidence.notes: Manual Feishu sync now asks the OAuth module for a fresh access token. Expired or near-expired stored access tokens are refreshed through the official OAuth token endpoint, new one-time refresh tokens replace old encrypted credentials, and provider imports continue with the refreshed access token.

features.next: Cancelled 2026-06-03: Feishu OAuth token refresh was removed with the rest of the connector path.

features.title: Import Feishu legacy doc raw content on manual sync
scope: Extract direct legacy `/docs/{docToken}` and `/doc/{docToken}` tokens from saved Feishu URLs.
Resolve wiki nodes with `obj_type: doc` to legacy document tokens.
Fetch old document plain text through the official `doc/v2/:docToken/raw_content` API.
Reuse connector provenance, deterministic Content Signals, content hashing, recognition timing, and sanitized reader HTML.
Use the resolved wiki node title when Feishu returns one.
Record connector Capture Events without storing raw content in the event stream.
definitionOfDone: `POST /api/connectors/feishu/sync` imports direct legacy docs URL-only items through `doc/v2/:docToken/raw_content`.
`POST /api/connectors/feishu/sync` resolves wiki `doc` nodes to legacy docs before raw-content import.
Imported legacy docs use `captureMethod: connector` and `sourceAccess: requires_auth` without `requiredConnector`.
Capture Events record legacy doc connector import outcomes without raw content leakage.
`pnpm smoke:api` covers direct legacy docs, wiki-to-legacy-doc resolution, raw-content import, item replacement, and event privacy.
`pnpm verify` passes with the Feishu legacy doc sync slice included.

verification.proves: Saved direct legacy docs and wiki nodes resolving to old doc objects can move from `needs_connector` to connector-imported `ready` content with mocked Feishu doc v2 raw-content responses.
The expanded docx/legacy-doc target model compiles cleanly.
Legacy doc raw-content sync remains compatible with the full local gate.

evidence.mockBoundary: Smoke coverage mocks Feishu wiki get_node and doc v2 raw-content HTTP responses. The implementation imports old doc plain text, but does not import non-document wiki objects, block structures, images, attachments, permission changes, or background sync.
evidence.notes: Manual Feishu sync now recognizes legacy docs URLs and wiki nodes resolving to `doc`, fetches old document raw text through the official doc v2 endpoint, rebuilds saved items with connector provenance, and keeps raw document text out of Capture Events.

features.next: Cancelled 2026-06-03: Feishu legacy doc raw-content sync was part of the removed connector import path.
